title: todea barbara subsp. rivularis
intro: Todea barbara subsp. rivularis, also known as the climbing fern, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Osmundaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Todea barbara subsp. rivularis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
